steps.description: Retrieve customer profile and plan details
steps.agent_says_en: Let me pull up your account details.
steps.agent_says_hi: Main aapka account details dekhta hoon.

steps.description: Check if connection is online or offline
steps.agent_says_en: I'm checking your connection status now.
steps.agent_says_hi: Main aapka connection status check kar raha hoon.

steps.description: Verify router and ONT health
steps.agent_says_en: Let me check your router health.
steps.agent_says_hi: Router ki health check karta hoon.

steps.description: Attempt remote router restart if router is online but connection is down
steps.agent_says_en: I'll try restarting your router remotely.
steps.agent_says_hi: Main router ko remotely restart karne ki koshish karta hoon.

steps.description: If restart doesn't resolve, log complaint for field visit
steps.agent_says_en: I've logged a complaint and a technician will visit within 24 hours.
steps.agent_says_hi: Complaint register kar di hai, technician 24 ghante mein aayega.

escalation_criteria: Router offline, fiber signal lost, area outage confirmed

trigger_phrases: speed test mein kam aa raha hai

steps.description: Get customer plan to know expected speed
steps.agent_says_en: Let me check your account and plan details.
steps.agent_says_hi: Aapka account aur plan details dekhta hoon.

steps.description: Run remote speed test to measure actual throughput
steps.agent_says_en: Running a speed test on your connection now.
steps.agent_says_hi: Aapke connection pe speed test chala raha hoon.

steps.description: Check how many devices are consuming bandwidth
steps.agent_says_en: Let me check how many devices are connected.
steps.agent_says_hi: Dekhta hoon kitne devices connected hain.

steps.description: Check router for firmware issues or overheating
steps.agent_says_en: Checking your router health and settings.
steps.agent_says_hi: Router ki health aur settings check kar raha hoon.

steps.description: If plan is insufficient for usage, suggest upgrade
steps.agent_says_en: Based on your usage, let me show you some better plan options.
steps.agent_says_hi: Aapke usage ke hisaab se kuch achhe plan options dikhata hoon.

escalation_criteria: Speed below 50% of plan after router restart, persistent issue across multiple tests

steps.description: Get customer and plan details
steps.agent_says_en: Let me access your account.
steps.agent_says_hi: Aapka account access karta hoon.

steps.description: Check WiFi signal strength and channel
steps.agent_says_en: Checking your WiFi signal and router settings.
steps.agent_says_hi: WiFi signal aur router settings check kar raha hoon.

steps.description: Check if too many devices are on WiFi
steps.agent_says_en: Let me see how many devices are on your WiFi.
steps.agent_says_hi: Dekhta hoon WiFi pe kitne devices hain.

steps.description: Restart router to refresh WiFi channels
steps.agent_says_en: I'll restart your router to refresh the WiFi configuration.
steps.agent_says_hi: Router restart karta hoon WiFi configuration refresh karne ke liye.

steps.description: If WiFi coverage issue persists, log for mesh extender assessment
steps.agent_says_en: I've logged a request - we may recommend a WiFi extender for your home.
steps.agent_says_hi: Request log kar di hai - aapke ghar ke liye WiFi extender recommend kar sakte hain.

escalation_criteria: Persistent WiFi drops after channel change, coverage dead zones requiring mesh extender

steps.description: Get customer profile with billing details
steps.agent_says_en: Let me pull up your account and billing history.
steps.agent_says_hi: Aapka account aur billing history dekhta hoon.

steps.description: Get current plan pricing for comparison
steps.agent_says_en: Checking your current plan details and charges.
steps.agent_says_hi: Aapke current plan ki details aur charges check kar raha hoon.

steps.description: Log billing complaint for finance team review
steps.agent_says_en: I've raised a billing complaint - our finance team will review within 48 hours.
steps.agent_says_hi: Billing complaint raise kar di hai - finance team 48 ghante mein review karegi.

escalation_criteria: Duplicate charges, refund requests over 1000 INR, recurring billing errors

steps.description: Get current plan details
steps.agent_says_en: Let me check your current plan first.
steps.agent_says_hi: Pehle aapka current plan dekhta hoon.

steps.description: Show details of current plan
steps.agent_says_en: Here are your current plan details.
steps.agent_says_hi: Yeh rahi aapke current plan ki details.

steps.description: Search and show available plan options
steps.agent_says_en: Here are the available plans you can switch to.
steps.agent_says_hi: Yeh hain available plans jinmein switch kar sakte hain.

steps.description: Get details of customer's chosen plan
steps.agent_says_en: Let me show you the full details of that plan.
steps.agent_says_hi: Is plan ki poori details dikhata hoon.

escalation_criteria: Downgrade requests from high-value customers, cancellation threats during downgrade

steps.description: Get customer details
steps.agent_says_en: Let me access your account details.
steps.agent_says_hi: Aapka account details access karta hoon.

steps.description: Run comprehensive router diagnostics
steps.agent_says_en: Running diagnostics on your router now.
steps.agent_says_hi: Router pe diagnostics chala raha hoon.

steps.description: Check if the connection itself is fine
steps.agent_says_en: Checking your connection status as well.
steps.agent_says_hi: Connection status bhi check kar raha hoon.

steps.description: Attempt router restart if possible
steps.agent_says_en: I'll try to restart the router.
steps.agent_says_hi: Router restart karne ki koshish karta hoon.

steps.description: If hardware issue, log for router replacement
steps.agent_says_en: I've logged a complaint for router replacement - a technician will visit you.
steps.agent_says_hi: Router replacement ke liye complaint log kar di - technician aayega aapke paas.

escalation_criteria: Router not powering on, persistent red LOS light, repeated auto-reboots

steps.description: Show available plans for the customer
steps.agent_says_en: Here are our available JioFiber plans.
steps.agent_says_hi: Yeh hain hamare available JioFiber plans.

steps.description: Get details of plan customer is interested in
steps.agent_says_en: Let me give you the full details of this plan.
steps.agent_says_hi: Is plan ki poori details deta hoon.

steps.description: Compare with alternative plans if customer asks
steps.agent_says_en: Here's how it compares with other plans.
steps.agent_says_hi: Doosre plans ke saath compare karein.

escalation_criteria: Area not serviceable, customer requesting special installation arrangements

steps.description: Get customer details to find complaints
steps.agent_says_en: Let me look up your account.
steps.agent_says_hi: Aapka account dekhta hoon.

steps.description: Check status of existing complaints
steps.agent_says_en: Checking the status of your complaint now.
steps.agent_says_hi: Aapki complaint ka status check kar raha hoon.

steps.description: If unresolved beyond SLA, escalate with new complaint
steps.agent_says_en: I've escalated this with a priority flag. You'll get an update within 4 hours.
steps.agent_says_hi: Priority flag ke saath escalate kar diya hai. 4 ghante mein update milega.

escalation_criteria: Complaint open beyond 48 hours, customer called more than twice about same issue

steps.description: Get customer details and history
steps.agent_says_en: Let me pull up your account details.
steps.agent_says_hi: Aapka account details dekhta hoon.

steps.description: Check if cancellation is due to unresolved issues
steps.agent_says_en: I see you've had some issues. Let me check if those are resolved.
steps.agent_says_hi: Aapko kuch issues aaye the. Check karta hoon woh resolve hue ya nahi.

steps.description: Verify current service quality
steps.agent_says_en: Let me check your current connection quality.
steps.agent_says_hi: Aapki current connection quality check karta hoon.

steps.description: Offer alternative plan or retention deal
steps.agent_says_en: Before canceling, may I suggest a plan that might better suit your needs?
steps.agent_says_hi: Cancel karne se pehle, kya main koi aisa plan suggest karun jo aapke liye better ho?

steps.description: If insisted, process cancellation request
steps.agent_says_en: I've processed your cancellation request. A team will contact you for equipment pickup.
steps.agent_says_hi: Cancellation request process kar di hai. Equipment pickup ke liye team contact karegi.

escalation_criteria: High-value customer (Platinum/Titanium), customer with tenure over 60 days, multiple past complaints

trigger_phrases: naya device WiFi se nahi jud raha
printer WiFi se nahi connect ho raha

steps.description: Get customer account details
steps.agent_says_en: Let me access your account.
steps.agent_says_hi: Aapka account access karta hoon.

steps.description: Verify overall connection is working
steps.agent_says_en: First, let me verify your connection is active.
steps.agent_says_hi: Pehle check karta hoon ki connection active hai.

steps.description: Check if device limit or DHCP pool is exhausted
steps.agent_says_en: Checking how many devices are currently connected.
steps.agent_says_hi: Dekh raha hoon abhi kitne devices connected hain.

steps.description: Check router DHCP and band settings
steps.agent_says_en: Checking your router settings for device compatibility.
steps.agent_says_hi: Router ki settings check kar raha hoon device compatibility ke liye.

steps.description: Restart router to refresh connections and DHCP
steps.agent_says_en: I'll restart the router to refresh the connection pool. Try connecting your device after 2 minutes.
steps.agent_says_hi: Router restart karta hoon connection pool refresh karne ke liye. 2 minute baad device connect karne ki koshish karein.

escalation_criteria: Multiple devices unable to connect, persistent DHCP failures after restart
